/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 1D/CTS 1/DNA/VI4 200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/COLLECT/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $500 PLUS $1399,50 INASSESSMENTS FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $1899,50,/COMUN:200/X:COMMUNITY HOURS THROUGH APD/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CONT/
